models.name: One-Time Assessment
models.tagline: Understand your risk surface before you commit to a broader program.
models.description: A focused engagement to assess a specific area — application, cloud, identity, or infrastructure. Delivers a clear findings report with prioritized recommendations.
models.bestFor: Organizations starting a security program or evaluating a specific technology or domain.

models.name: Project Delivery
models.tagline: Build and implement the controls your environment needs.
models.description: A scoped engineering engagement with defined deliverables, milestones, and timelines. Covers assessment, design, engineering, validation, and knowledge transfer.
models.bestFor: Organizations with a defined security objective requiring expert engineering delivery.

models.name: Dedicated Specialists
models.tagline: Embedded expertise that works as an extension of your team.
models.description: Dedicated Mitigence specialists embedded into your team on a defined schedule. Provides ongoing engineering, operational support, and continuous improvement.
models.bestFor: Organizations that need consistent security engineering without a full internal team.

models.name: Managed Engineering Program
models.tagline: Continuous security operations managed by Mitigence engineers.
models.description: A fully managed security engineering service covering monitoring, detection engineering, incident response, and continuous improvement across your environment.
models.bestFor: Organizations seeking continuous security operations without building an in-house team.

models.name: Strategic Advisory Program
models.tagline: Senior expertise to guide your program at the strategic level.
models.description: Ongoing vCISO or security advisory relationship providing guidance on program strategy, risk governance, board reporting, and vendor evaluation.
models.bestFor: Organizations that need strategic security leadership rather than engineering delivery.
